FOREWORD

servinfo.title: Excessive engine oil consumption – Oil leakage

servinfo.title: Excessive engine oil consumption – Oil entering combustion chamber
servinfo.symdesc: Excessive engine oil consumption – Oil entering combustion chamber

servinfo.title: Engine hesitates – Momentary lack of response as accelerator is depressed. Can occur at all vehicle speeds. Usually most severe when moving out from a stop at stop signal etc.
servinfo.symdesc: Engine hesitates – Momentary lack of response as accelerator is depressed. Can occur at all vehicle speeds. Usually most severe when moving out from a stop at stop signal etc.

servinfo.title: Surge – Engine power variation under steady throttle or cruise. Vehicle speed changes up and down with no change in accelerator pedal position.
servinfo.symdesc: Surge – Engine power variation under steady throttle or cruise. Vehicle speed changes up and down with no change in accelerator pedal position.

servinfo.title: Excessive detonation – Engine continuously generates sharp, metallic knocking sound that changes with throttle opening.
servinfo.symdesc: Excessive detonation – Engine continuously generates sharp, metallic knocking sound that changes with throttle opening.

servinfo.title: Poor engine power
servinfo.symdesc: Poor engine power

servinfo.title: Improper engine idling or engine fails to idle
servinfo.symdesc: Improper engine idling or engine fails to idle

servinfo.title: Excessive hydrocarbon (HC) emission or carbon monoxide (CO) emission
servinfo.symdesc: Excessive hydrocarbon (HC) emission or carbon monoxide (CO) emission

servinfo.title: Excessive nitrogen oxides (NOx) emission
servinfo.symdesc: Excessive nitrogen oxides (NOx) emission

servinfo.symdesc: Engine overheats (Radiator fan operates)

servinfo.title: Engine overheats (Radiator fan does not operate)
